name: systems-thinking-toolkit
description: Systems thinking toolkit grounded in Dennis Sherwood, Seeing the Forest for the Trees (2002). 7 functional skills + 1 router. Carry-1 cld-craft (prose → fully-annotated Mermaid CLD; 12 hygiene rules + Rule 7 fuzzy elevation + R/B classification + Sterman uniflow discipline; v0.8 optional CLD falsifiability protocol). Downstream: cld-archetypes (limits-to-growth + variance/target/action), cld-overlay (outward stakeholder straddle), team-mental-model (inward convergence + leadership energy proxies), strategy-lever-and-cascade (v0.6 Martian-test inline; v0.7 STOP rule + HOLD-lever), simulation-modeling (CLD → stock-flow; v0.10 adds **executable Python companion** — single-file PEP-723 simulator with Euler integration, JSON CLD spec input, CSV + ASCII-chart output, 21-test analytical-tolerance suite covering exponential R-loop / goal-seeking B-loop / logistic limits-to-growth / Lotka-Volterra predator-prey — closes Sherwood Ch 12-13 ithink/Stella gap with stdlib-only manager-grade tooling). Plus V1-weak manager-personality-quadrant with v0.9 Graduate Routing decision tree. v0.9 adds 4 platform-economy R-loop cases (Case 13 network effects / Case 14 two-sided market / Case 15 winner-take-most algorithm concentration / Case A5 platform saturation limits-to-growth) filling Sherwood's pre-2010 platform-economy blind spot. Distilled via tsundoku:book-distill RIA-TV++ pipeline. システム思考ツールキット — Sherwood 2002 ベース。系統思考工具組 — Sherwood 2002 為本。
